features: COMPLETE HAIR REMOVAL SOLUTION – Includes x1 Nair Smoothing Cream Bikini & Under Arm (100ml), x1 Nair Tough Hair Cream Legs & Body (90ml), and x1 BVO Luxe Depilatory Spatula Tool, offering a comprehensive hair removal experience for legs, body, bikini, and underarms, leaving your skin smooth, soft, and silky.
LONG-LASTING RESULTS – Enjoy hair-free skin for up to 7 days after application, with a formula that works below the surface to remove hair effectively.
GENTLE FOR SENSITIVE AREAS – Dermatologically tested and designed for sensitive skin, perfect for areas like the bikini line, pubic region, and genitals.
EASY APPLICATION WITH SPATULA TOOL – Includes x1 depilatory spatula tool for mess-free, even application, ensuring smooth results every time.
MOISTURIZING AND CARING – Enriched with natural extracts to hydrate and soften the skin, leaving you feeling smooth and refreshed after every use.
description: Product description COMPLETE HAIR REMOVAL CREAM BUNDLE FOR SMOOTH, SILKY SKIN – GENTLE & EFFECTIVE HAIR REMOVAL FOR LEGS, BODY, BIKINI, AND UNDERARMS WITH BVO LUXE SPATULA TOOL Achieve professional-level smoothness from the comfort of your home with our Complete Hair Removal Bundle, tailored to target every area of your body. Whether you're focusing on legs, body, bikini line, or sensitive underarms, this bundle offers a painless and easy solution for hair removal that leaves your skin looking and feeling its best. BUNDLE INCLUDES x1 Nair Smoothing Cream Bikini & Under Arm (100ml): Specifically formulated for sensitive areas like the bikini line and underarms, offering a smooth and irritation-free finish. x1 Nair Tough Hair Cream Legs & Body (90ml): Tough on coarse hair, this cream delivers longer-lasting results for legs and body, leaving your skin soft and silky. x1 BVO Luxe Depilatory Spatula Tool: A gentle, easy-to-use spatula tool for applying the creams evenly and effortlessly across all areas. SALON-QUALITY RESULTS AT HOME Our hair removal creams work beneath the surface of your skin, delivering silky-smooth results that last longer than shaving. With powerful, yet gentle formulas, you can enjoy hair-free skin for days, without the discomfort of stubble or regrowth. MOISTURIZING & NOURISHING FORMULA Enriched with natural extracts, our dermatologically tested creams not only remove unwanted hair but also hydrate and pamper your skin. Suitable for all skin types, including sensitive and delicate areas like the bikini line, underarms, and pubic region, these creams leave your skin soft, moisturized, and irritation-free. VERSATILE HAIR REMOVAL FOR ALL BODY AREAS Legs & Body: Effectively removes hair from legs, arms, and other large areas, leaving your skin smooth and soft for up to 7 days. Bikini & Underarms: Specially formulated to handle delicate zones like the bikini line and underarms, ensuring a gentle yet effective hair removal experience for sensitive areas. WHY CHOOSE OUR COMPLETE HAIR REMOVAL BUNDLE? Fast & Effective: Removes unwanted hair quickly from all areas, including sensitive zones like the pubic region. Gentle & Safe: Dermatologically tested to be safe for all skin types, including sensitive skin and intimate areas. Moisturizing Benefits: Formulas enriched with nourishing ingredients that care for your skin while removing hair, leaving it soft, hydrated, and smooth. All-in-One Solution: No need for multiple products—this complete bundle provides everything you need for full-body hair removal. EASY, EFFORTLESS HAIR REMOVAL Forget about the pain and hassle of traditional methods. With our Complete Hair Removal Cream Bundle, achieving long-lasting smoothness is as easy as applying, waiting, and removing—all in the comfort of your home. Perfect for leg hair removal, bikini hair removal, and full-body hair removal. Directions 1. Perform a patch test 24 hours prior to full application by applying a small amount to a section of skin. 2. Apply the cream to the desired area using the BVO Luxe Depilatory Spatula Tool. 3. Leave the cream on for the recommended time (not specified in the provided information, but typically 3-6 minutes for hair removal creams). 4. Remove the cream using the spatula tool or a damp cloth. 5. Rinse the area with warm water. 6. Avoid contact with eyes, lips, and any inflamed, broken, or sunburned skin. 7. Do not use on the face, inside the nose or ears, or on any other sensitive areas not recommended by the product instructions. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes, lips, and any inflamed, broken, or sunburned skin. In case of contact with eyes, rinse immediately with plenty of water and seek medical advice. Patch Test: Perform a patch test 24 hours prior to full application by applying a small amount to a section of skin. If irritation or an allergic reaction occurs, discontinue use immediately. Do not use on the face, inside the nose or ears, or on any other sensitive areas not recommended by the product instructions. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use if you have a history of skin allergies, or if your skin is sensitive to depilatory products. If irritation persists after use, seek medical advice. Store in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight. See more
